name: sidebar-footer
visual_summary: The sidebar-footer component is a UI element that is typically positioned at the bottom of a sidebar. It is used to display supplementary information, actions, or links that are related to the main content of the sidebar. This component is usually placed in a horizontal layout and has a fixed height to ensure consistency across different devices.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready footer component with the following characteristics:

Name: sidebar-footer
Description: The sidebar-footer component is a UI element that is typically positioned at the bottom of a sidebar. It is used to display supplementary information, actions, or links that are related to the main content of the sidebar. This component is usually placed in a horizontal layout and has a fixed height to ensure consistency across different devices.
Style: minimal, responsive
Interactions: clickable, responsive
Tags: footer, sidebar, content, supplementary

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
